challenges.claim_tested: Knoll exact-96 derivative has verified same-master lineage.
challenges.evidence_checked: Manifest source hash 5063997597700dd1019625aeadf2e642e6928193972a33d13058f9ea7a3ae70b; native hash 693970d82d7294d3238561c1716258ebcdb60b21e445af326fa211e36938d918; independently reconstructed 96x96 RGB ImageOps.contain LANCZOS derivative.
challenges.rationale: Reconstructed pixels equal the native derivative exactly with maximum channel delta 0.

challenges.claim_tested: Knoll's positive first read is an office stamp contacting one continuous receipt.
challenges.rationale: Pear handle, stepped broad base, base-to-paper contact, and the single pale curling receipt remain separable; the hand-to-stamp-to-receipt action is mechanically continuous.

challenges.claim_tested: Knoll avoids hammer, anvil, table, block, staff, and cane reads.
challenges.evidence_checked: Native 96px silhouette and master hand/prop anatomy.
challenges.rationale: There is no long shaft, lateral striking head, hard work surface, separate block, or walking-stick structure; the broad base terminates directly on flexible paper.

challenges.claim_tested: P006 uses the approved matte Vellum authority rather than the forbidden shiny variant.
challenges.evidence_checked: Approved raw and cutout files, P006 comparison, and current SHA-256 values.
challenges.rationale: Raw hash 824b55085428af5ef7e0e760edc76400b333c90d8d71c7703aa97848e6752c18 and cutout hash 6f10ecb18330ec3574a4c5950d8cf89a34fcda466f617d9387de2630607b96a0 match exactly; P006 visibly uses the dry same-art cutout.

challenges.claim_tested: No unchanged unit presents a concrete visible regression.
challenges.evidence_checked: All three reports plus frozen master, face, exact-96, role-lineup, and Vellum comparison evidence.
challenges.rationale: No report identifies a regression, lineage break, anatomy failure, lost silhouette, or sub-professional dimension; rating differences remain non-blocking.

response_to_peer_evidence.agreement: Both peer seats independently support Knoll closure, exact lineage, forbidden-read exclusion, approved Vellum hashes, no unchanged-unit regression, and READY.
response_to_peer_evidence.disagreement: None affecting readiness. Differences between PROFESSIONAL and EXCELLENT are calibration differences only; every required dimension remains at least PROFESSIONAL.

knoll_final_status.evidence: Native 96px first-read, master anatomy, hashes, and zero-delta same-master reconstruction all sustain closure.
